# mypackage/__init__.py
__all__ = ["__version__"]

__version__ = "1.0.0"


def __getattr__(name: str):
    if name == "models":
        from mypackage import models
        return models
    if name == "services":
        from mypackage import services
        return services
    raise AttributeError(f"module {__name__!r} has no attribute {name!r}")
